GOAL: Re-attempt processing of the two macro recordings Tate made on 6 May 2026 ~19:30 + ~19:38 AEST. The previous attempt (fork_motvavfc_274580) bailed after discovering the recordings landed as raw events.jsonl + frames in dated dirs on Corazon, NOT as .js handlers — `post-process.bat` is a stub. Pipeline upstream of this fork is now stable: vision-enrich.js was just rewired through the canonical OS Anthropic client (claude_max OAuth chain) by fork_motuvu0q_de7349 (just landed).

ORIGIN: Tat

GOAL: Tate clicked the Chambers password reset email; the link landed on `https://chambers.ecodia.app/#...` (Supabase recovery hash fragment with access_token/refresh_token/type=recovery), but no password-reset page renders. Either the FE has no recovery-handler route, OR the redirect URL the email uses doesn't match an existing route. Fix it. Tate is still locked out.

ORIGIN: Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 19:51 AEST: "ithe email just takes me to /#... no pw reaet page?"
